items.title: Join the new AI Agents Vibe Coding Course from Google and Kaggle
items.raw_content: A web next to a laptop
items.ai_summary: Google与Kaggle联合推出AI Agents Vibe Coding新课程，将于2026年6月开课。

items.title: 8 Gemini tips for organizing your space (and life)
items.raw_content: Black screen with illustrations including a laptop with document and email icons streaming out, a smiling person holding a phone and looking at a checklist, and a user activating Gemini Live
items.ai_summary: Google Gemini提供8个整理空间与生活的实用技巧，包括使用Gemini Live等功能。

items.title: Elevating Austria: Google invests in its first data center in the Alps.
items.raw_content: Aerial image of the data center
items.ai_summary: Google在奥地利阿尔卑斯地区投资建设首个数据中心，提升欧洲基础设施。

items.title: Here’s how our TPUs power increasingly demanding AI workloads.
items.raw_content: Learn how Google’s TPUs power increasingly demanding AI workloads with this new video.
items.ai_summary: Google发布新视频，介绍其TPU如何支持日益增长的AI工作负载。

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.raw_content: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.ai_summary: Google推出两款专为智能体时代设计的第八代TPU芯片，将推动AI未来发展。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.raw_content: The Road to Google Marketing Live graphic. May 20, 2026, 9am PT. White background with colorful bottom gradient.
items.ai_summary: Google Ads Advisor推出三项新功能，使Google Ads更安全、更快速，预告2026年5月活动。

items.title: 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
items.raw_content: Illustration showing a person with a Pixel phone in a beach town farmers' market by the water
items.ai_summary: Google提供7种夏季智能旅行方式，借助搜索和AI工具提升旅行体验。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.raw_content: Example images made with Personal Intelligence
items.ai_summary: Gemini应用新增个性化图像生成功能，用户可创建定制化图片。

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.ai_summary: Chrome浏览器推出AI模式，提供全新的网页探索方式。

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
items.raw_content: Gemini logo next to the text "3.1 Flash TTS", all over colored dots
items.ai_summary: Google发布Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS，新一代表达性AI语音技术。
